name: YourPAL
framing: An AI study companion designed to fight procrastination and burnout.

blocks.body: YourPAL is a productivity app built from the ground up to tackle procrastination, burnout and timekeeping. The concept: an AI-driven personal assistant that learns your work habits, pinpoints your peak productivity hours, and builds bespoke schedules around them — going beyond task management to measure wellness and surface insights into how you actually work.

My introduction to Figma and app design — and as much an exercise in user journey and mapping as in interface design, tracing how a student moves through the app over the course of a day, a week, a term.

blocks.alt: Iteration shots — flows and screen drafts

blocks.body: Wireframes, flows and a functional Figma mockup — the foundation for what an iterative build would refine.

blocks.alt: Key screens — the dashboard, the schedule, the wellness view
